title: TransactionOptions
description: Configuration options that modify transaction processing behavior.

submit_for_settlement.description: If true, the transaction is automatically submitted for settlement after authorization. Defaults to false.

store_in_vault.description: If true, the payment method is stored in the Braintree Vault after the transaction is created.

store_in_vault_on_success.description: If true, the payment method is stored in the Vault only if the transaction is successfully authorized.

skip_avs.description: Skip the address verification check for this transaction.

skip_cvv.description: Skip the CVV verification check for this transaction.

hold_in_escrow.description: If true, funds are held in escrow rather than disbursed immediately. Applicable to Braintree Marketplace transactions only.
